answers: Scrum = most popular Agile framework. Work in 2-4 week sprints with defined roles and ceremonies.
Scrum roles: Product Owner (what to build), Scrum Master (facilitator), Development Team (builders).
Ceremonies: Sprint Planning, Daily Standup (15 min), Sprint Review (demo), Sprint Retrospective (improve).
Scrum artifacts: Product Backlog (all work), Sprint Backlog (this sprint's work), Increment (done work).
